name: Dev Agent
description: Autonomous AI dev agent — builds, deploys, and manages web projects with filesystem, git, GitHub, and multi-platform deployment

googleApiKey.description: Google API key for Gemini models

githubToken.description: GitHub personal access token for repo/PR/issue management

flyApiToken.description: Fly.io API token for container deployments

braveApiKey.description: Brave Search API key for web search

events.name: project_created
events.description: Fires when a new project is created or scaffolded

events.name: build_completed
events.description: Fires when Claude Code finishes a coding task

events.name: server_started
events.description: Fires when a dev server is started

events.name: deploy_triggered
events.description: Fires when a deployment is triggered

events.name: screenshot_taken
events.description: Fires when a page screenshot is captured

events.name: github_pr_created
events.description: Fires when a pull request is created

events.name: github_issue_created
events.description: Fires when a GitHub issue is created

events.name: watcher_event
events.description: Fires when a watcher agent detects new activity on a repo

actions.name: Build App
actions.description: Scaffold and build a new web application

actions.name: Spawn Coder
actions.description: Delegate a coding task to Claude Code

actions.name: Take Screenshot
actions.description: Screenshot a localhost page to check design

actions.name: Start Server
actions.description: Start a dev server in background

actions.name: Create PR
actions.description: Create a pull request on GitHub

actions.name: Review PR
actions.description: AI-powered code review of a pull request

actions.name: Deploy to Vercel
actions.description: Create or deploy a Vercel project

actions.name: Deploy to Fly.io
actions.description: Deploy a Docker app to Fly.io

actions.name: Crawl Site
actions.description: Crawl a website for SEO analysis

examples.description: Scaffolds a Next.js project and builds a complete portfolio site
Identifies the project and spawns Claude Code to fix it
Triggers a Netlify deployment for the current project
Fetches the PR diff and posts an AI code review
Runs a Lighthouse audit and reports scores

examples.prompt: create a github issue for the broken login
examples.description: Creates a GitHub issue with details

examples.prompt: search the web for tailwind v4 migration guide

examples.description: Loads project context and continues where you left off
